question: Who are all the Presidents of France?
¿Quiénes son todos los Presidentes de Francia?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?person WHERE {
  ?person rdf:type dbo:Person .
  ?person dbo:office ?office .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?office)), "president of france"))
}

question: Which actor appeared in the most films in a single decade?
generated:
SELECT DISTINCT ?actor (COUNT(?film) AS ?filmCount) WHERE {
  ?film a <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Film> .
  ?film <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/starring> ?actor .
  ?film <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/year> ?year .
  BIND((FLOOR(?year / 10) * 10) AS ?decade)
}
GROUP BY ?actor ?decade
ORDER BY DESC(?filmCount)
LIMIT 1

question: ¿Qué actor apareció en la mayor cantidad de películas en una sola década?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?actor ?decade (COUNT(*) AS ?movieCount) WHERE {
  ?movie a dbo:Film .
  ?movie dbo:starring ?actor .
  ?movie dbo:releaseDate ?releaseDate .
  BIND(FLOOR(year(?releaseDate) / 10) * 10 AS ?decade)
} GROUP BY ?actor ?decade
ORDER BY DESC(?movieCount)
LIMIT 1

question: Who (either an actor or a musician) has received the highest number of awards?
¿Quién (ya sea un actor o un músico) ha recibido el mayor número de premios?
Which are the 5 bands or musicians who have produced the highest number of albums?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?artist WHERE {
  ?album a dbo:Album .
  ?album dbo:artist ?artist .
}
GROUP BY ?artist
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(*))
LIMIT 5

question: ¿Cuáles son las 5 bandas o músicos que han producido el mayor número de álbumes?
generated:
SELECT DISTINCT ?artist (COUNT(*) AS ?albumCount) WHERE {
  ?album a <http://schema.org/MusicAlbum> .
  ?album <http://dbpedia.org/property/artist> ?artist .
  ?artist a ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (<http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Band>, <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/Singer>))
}
GROUP BY ?artist
ORDER BY DESC(?albumCount)
LIMIT 5

question: Which are the top 3 taxonomic kingdoms that have the largest number of endangered species?
¿Cuáles son los 3 reinos taxonómicos con el mayor número de especies en peligro de extinción?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?kingdom WHERE {
    ?species a dbo:Species .
    ?species dbo:conservationStatus ?status .
    ?species dbo:kingdom ?kingdom .
    FILTER(?status IN ("CR", "EN", "VU")) .
    FILTER(STRSTARTS(STR(?kingdom), "http://dbpedia.org/resource/"))
  }
GROUP BY ?kingdom
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(*))
LIMIT 3

PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

Name some comic characters created by Stan Lee?
generated:
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?character WHERE {
  ?character dbo:creator <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Stan_Lee> .
  ?character rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(?type IN (dbo:ComicCharacter, dbo:Character, dbo:FictionalCharacter))
}

Which artist created American IV: The Man Comes Around and also performed Hurt at least once?

Stephen Merchant is the executive producer of the series having how many fictional characters?
Stephen Merchant es el productor ejecutivo de la serie que tiene ¿cuántos personajes ficticios?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>

SELECT DISTINCT (COUNT(DISTINCT ?character) AS ?countCharacters) WHERE {
  ?character dbo:series <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Lip_Sync_Battle> .
  ?character rdf:type ?type .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "character") || CONTAINS(LCASE(STR(?type)), "fictional"))
}

question: In which countries are the children peaks from Denali located and what are them?
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?peak ?country WHERE {
  VALUES ?peak {
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Avalanche_Spire>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Fake_Peak>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Middle_Triple_Peak>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_Dickey>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_Huntington_(Alaska)>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_Silverthrone_(Alaska)>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Mount_Stevens_(Alaska)>
    <http://dbpedia.org/resource/The_Moose's_Tooth>
  }
  BIND(<http://dbpedia.org/resource/United_States> AS ?country)
}

question: Through which cities do the rivers originating in Yellowstone National Park flow?

}

Which alliance has the most member airlines?
golden:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX dbp: <http://dbpedia.org/property/>
SELECT ?uri
WHERE {
  ?airline a dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbp:alliance ?uri .
}
GROUP BY ?uri
ORDER BY DESC(COUNT(DISTINCT ?airline))
OFFSET 0 LIMIT 1
generated:
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>

SELECT DISTINCT ?alliance (COUNT(*) AS ?memberCount)
WHERE {
  ?airline a dbo:Airline .
  ?airline dbo:alliance ?alliance .
}
GROUP BY ?alliance
ORDER BY DESC(?memberCount)
LIMIT 1

question: What other countries speak the same language as Brazil's official one?
generated:
PREFIX dbr: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
PREFIX dbo: <http://dbpedia.org/ontology/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?country WHERE {
  ?country rdf:type dbo:Country .
  ?country dbo:officialLanguage dbr:Portuguese_language .
  ?country dbo:populationTotal ?population .
  ?country rdfs:label ?label .
  FILTER(LANG(?label) = "en")
  FILTER(?country != dbr:Brazil)
  FILTER(?country NOT IN (
    dbr:Cabeça_do_Cachorro,
    dbr:Macau,
    dbr:Holy_Empire_of_Reunion
  ))
}

SELECT DISTINCT ?island ?islandLabel WHERE {
  ?island a dbo:Island .
  ?island ?p <http://dbpedia.org/resource/Tuamotus> .

}
LIMIT 20

Which other firearms were designed by the creator of the AK-47?

PREFIX res: <http://dbpedia.org/resource/>
